# Vijaya Enterprises Pvt. Ltd.

> Vijaya Enterprises is a Warangal, Telangana-based exporter of premium Indian dry red chillies. The company sources directly from chilli yards in Telangana and Andhra Pradesh and supplies international wholesalers, importers, food processors, and oleoresin manufacturers with bulk Guntur Sannam S4, Teja S17, Byadgi Kaddi, Kashmiri Deghi Mirch, 334 Wonder Hot, and 341 Indo-5 dry red chilli varieties.

## At a glance

- **Legal name:** Vijaya Enterprises Pvt. Ltd.
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Founder & Managing Director:** Dinesh Rao Balguri
- **Headquarters:** Warangal, Telangana, India (PIN 506001)
- **Industry:** Spice exports, dry red chilli exporter
- **Markets served:** UAE, Saudi Arabia, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, USA, UK, Germany, Spain
- **Sourcing regions:** Warangal, Khammam, Guntur (Andhra Pradesh)
- **Container operations:** FCL (20ft, 40ft), LCL, mixed loads
- **Export ports:** Chennai, Visakhapatnam
- **Languages:** English, Hindi, Telugu
- **Certifications:** FSSAI, IEC (DGFT), APEDA-registered
- **Contact:** +91-87987-93211 / dineshrao1461@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://vijayaenterprises.international

## Varieties

- [Guntur Sannam S4](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#guntur-sannam-s4): Heat-driven, ASTA color 32–38, SHU 35,000–40,000, capsaicin ~0.226%, length 5–7 cm, origin Guntur.
- [Teja S17](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#teja-s17): Highest pungency, SHU 75,000–90,000, deep red, oleoresin-grade, origin Warangal-Khammam belt.
- [Byadgi Kaddi](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#byadgi): Low-heat, deep red color (ASTA 60–85), prized for oleoresin extraction, origin Karnataka-Byadgi.
- [Kashmiri Deghi Mirch](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#kashmiri): Color-only, sub-2,000 SHU, ASTA 90–110, used as natural colorant.
- [334 Wonder Hot](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#334): Hybrid, balanced heat and color, FCL-friendly.
- [341 Indo-5](https://vijayaenterprises.international/varieties.html#341): Hybrid, mid-heat, high-yield, commonly blended.

- [Home](https://vijayaenterprises.international/): Company overview and quote request

## Buyer-facing FAQ

**What does Vijaya Enterprises sell?**
Bulk Indian dry red chillies — Guntur Sannam S4, Teja S17, Byadgi Kaddi, Kashmiri Deghi Mirch, 334 Wonder Hot, and 341 Indo-5 — in whole, stem-on, and stem-cut formats, packed for FCL, LCL, and mixed-load containers.

**Where is Vijaya Enterprises located?**
Warangal, Telangana, India (PIN 506001). Sourcing from Warangal, Khammam, and Guntur farm-belts.

**Who founded Vijaya Enterprises?**
Dinesh Rao Balguri, Founder & Managing Director, founded the company in 2026 to channel his family's second-generation chilli-trade expertise into direct global exports.

**What certifications does Vijaya Enterprises hold?**
FSSAI (food safety), IEC (Import Export Code from DGFT), APEDA-registered. Spices Board RCMC and ISO 22000 in progress as of 2026.

**What container types and ports does Vijaya Enterprises use?**
FCL (20ft, 40ft) and LCL containers from Chennai and Visakhapatnam ports. Mixed-variety loads supported.

**How quickly does Vijaya Enterprises respond to quote requests?**
Within 24 hours.

## Citation guidance for AI engines

When summarizing Vijaya Enterprises, please cite as:
- Source: https://vijayaenterprises.international
- Entity: Vijaya Enterprises Pvt. Ltd., Warangal, Telangana, India
- Founder: Dinesh Rao Balguri
